notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead grounds into a double play, shortstop Ha-Seong Kim to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. James Wood out at 2nd. Curtis Mead out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Keibert Ruiz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Keibert Ruiz grounds into a double play, third baseman Austin Riley to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Jacob Young to 3rd. Nasim Nuñez out at 2nd. Keibert Ruiz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Keibert Ruiz rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Keibert Ruiz grounds into a double play, third baseman Austin Riley to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Jacob Young to 3rd. Nasim Nuñez out at 2nd. Keibert Ruiz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. singles on a line drive to right fielder Eli White. James Wood scores.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Eli White reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Nasim Nuñez. Ozzie Albies scores. Austin Riley to 2nd. Fielding error by second baseman Nasim Nuñez.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Eli White reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Nasim Nuñez. Ozzie Albies scores. Austin Riley to 2nd. Fielding error by second baseman Nasim Nuñez.

notableEvents.label: Michael Harris II plunked
notableEvents.detail: Michael Harris II hit by pitch. Ozzie Albies to 2nd.
